prompt_conditions.name: Unguided
prompt_conditions.system_prompt: Respond with HTML only. Do not include CSS, JavaScript, comments, or explanations.

prompt_conditions.name: Little Guidance
prompt_conditions.system_prompt: Generate accessible HTML. Respond with HTML only. Do not include CSS, JavaScript, comments, or explanations.

prompt_conditions.name: Expert Guidance
prompt_conditions.system_prompt: Generate accessible HTML for the requested component. Ensure that its purpose, any supporting text, and any states or feedback are conveyed through the HTML. Avoid relying on placeholder text alone to communicate meaning. Use HTML attributes so that relevant relationships and states can be interpreted by assistive technologies. Respond with HTML only. Do not include CSS, JavaScript, comments, or explanations.
